title: Notes Image Aspect Ratio Fix & Routine File Upload

requirements.summary: Remove fixed aspect ratio constraints from note image containers to display images at their natural dimensions while maintaining responsive behavior
acceptanceCriteria: Images in the Notes list view (NoteCard) display at their natural width/height proportions without letterboxing or cropping
Images in the NoteModal display at their natural proportions
No fixed aspect-ratio CSS classes remain on note image containers
Layout remains responsive and does not break on mobile viewports
All other NoteCard and NoteModal styles, layout, and functionality are unchanged

file_operations.description: Remove any fixed aspect ratio CSS classes (e.g., aspect-video, aspect-square) from image containers in the image note type rendering. Update the image container to allow natural image dimensions by removing aspect ratio constraints while preserving responsive width and other existing styles. Ensure the image element and its parent container adapt to the actual image proportions without forcing a fixed aspect ratio.

Remove any fixed aspect ratio CSS classes from image containers in the modal's image note type rendering. Update the image preview area to display images at their natural proportions by removing aspect ratio constraints while maintaining responsive behavior and existing modal layout. Ensure images scale appropriately without letterboxing or cropping.

requirements.summary: Integrate ImageUploadPicker component into RoutinesPage with identical UI, styling, and behavior as the Notes section implementation
acceptanceCriteria: RoutinesPage displays the same image upload trigger (camera/gallery/file picker) as the Notes section
All three upload options (camera, gallery, file) are present and functional in the routine section
Outside-click and Escape key close the upload dropdown in routines, matching Notes behavior
Uploaded images are stored and displayed within routine items using the same logic as notes image storage
Existing routine functionality (drag-and-drop, add/edit/delete items, weekday/weekend/today tabs, import/export) remains completely unchanged
Visual styling of the upload component in routines is pixel-identical to the notes upload component

file_operations.description: Integrate the ImageUploadPicker component into the routine item creation/editing flow by copying the exact implementation pattern from NotesPage/NoteModal. Add the same camera/gallery/file upload trigger button with identical styling, wire up the three upload options (camera, gallery, file), implement the same outside-click and Escape key dismissal behavior, and handle uploaded images using the blob-storage component's ExternalBlob class to store image references in routine items. Use the camera component's useCamera hook for camera functionality. Verify both the blob-storage and camera component usage instructions before implementing. Ensure the upload UI matches the notes section pixel-perfectly while preserving all existing routine functionality including drag-and-drop ordering, weekday/weekend/today tabs, and import/export features.
